claim_tested: A source-grounded graph-to-video compiler is a coherent Developer Tools opportunity worth evaluating.
limitations: Model synthesis is not external evidence
No learner outcome or willingness-to-pay claim is validated
The direct human brief authorizes evaluation but does not authorize its own MVP warrant

measurements.metric: Developers completing the architecture task correctly and faster with video

provenance.collection_method: Codex task analysis of the human-provided specification and inspected source baselines

sample_context.description: GPT-5.6 task analysis and product brief synthesis
